name: More Fruit Cherry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Comstock More Fruit Pie Filling (21 oz)
NOTE: For a 9-inch pie shell, use two 21 ounce cans of Cherry Filling.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Line a pie pan with the rolled pie crust.
3. Spread the filling evenly in the crust.
4. Place a vented or lattice top crust over the filling.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 375°F and continue baking for 30-40 minutes, until golden brown.
